driver_subject: memstick: jmb38x_ms: Annotate struct jmb38x_ms with __counted_by
stage1_reason: Addition of __counted_by attribute annotation for flexible array member bounds checking, which is a kernel API/compiler attribute change requiring driver adaptation.
stage2_reason: Driver commit explicitly adds __counted_by annotation to struct jmb38x_ms, which directly corresponds to the kernel API addition of __counted_by macro in the candidate commit. The driver migration (v6.6→v6.7) follows the kernel introduction (v6.5) within one version cycle, indicating adaptation to the new attribute.
